'''''UFC 294: Makhachev vs. Volkanovski 2''''' was a [[mixed martial arts]] event produced by the [[Ultimate Fighting Championship]] that took place on October 21, 2023, at the [[Etihad Arena]] in [[Abu Dhabi]], United Arab Emirates.<ref name="AbuDhabi">{{cite web |last=Erickson |first=Matt |date=March 16, 2023 |title=UFC returns to Abu Dhabi on Oct. 21 with UFC 294 |url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/lists/ufc-204-abu-dhabi-october-21-united-arab-emirates-mma-fight-announcement |access-date=March 16, 2023 |website=mmajunkie.usatoday.com |archive-date=May 20, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230520053820/https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/lists/ufc-204-abu-dhabi-october-21-united-arab-emirates-mma-fight-announcement |url-status=live }}</ref>

==Background==
The event marked the promotion's 18th visit to Abu Dhabi and first since [[UFC 280]] in October 2022.<ref name="AbuDhabi" />

{{multiple image
 | align = left
 | total_width = 360
 | image1 = Islam Makhachev 2022 UFC belt.png
 | width1 = 2600 | height1 = 2200
 | alt1 =
 | caption1 =
 | image2 = Alexander Volkanovski at UFC 232.jpg
 | width2 = 2300 | height2 = 2200
 | alt2 =
 | caption2 =
 | footer = Makhachev ''(left)'' made his second title defense. In the rematch, Volkanovski ''(right)'' aspired to become the second man to be a simultaneous UFC featherweight and lightweight champion.

}}

A [[UFC Lightweight Championship]] rematch between current champion [[Islam Makhachev]] and former champion [[Charles Oliveira]] was expected to headline the event.<ref>{{cite web |last=King |first=Nolan |date=July 19, 2023 |title=UFC 294 gets Islam Makhachev vs. Charles Oliveira 2 as main event |url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/07/ufc-294-gets-islam-makhachev-vs-charles-oliveira-2-as-main-event |access-date=July 19, 2023 |website=mmajunkie.usatoday.com |archive-date=July 20, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230720034227/https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/07/ufc-294-gets-islam-makhachev-vs-charles-oliveira-2-as-main-event |url-status=live }}</ref> The pair previously met at [[UFC 280]] one year prior, where Makhachev captured the vacant title by second round submission.<ref>{{cite web |last=Brookhouse |first=Brent |date=October 23, 2022 |title=UFC 280 results, highlights: Islam Makhachev submits Charles Oliveira to earn lightweight title |url=https://www.cbssports.com/mma/news/ufc-280-results-highlights-islam-makhachev-submits-charles-oliveira-to-earn-lightweight-title/live/amp/ |access-date=July 19, 2023 |website=cbssports.com |archive-date=November 8, 2022 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20221108155344/https://www.cbssports.com/mma/news/ufc-280-results-highlights-islam-makhachev-submits-charles-oliveira-to-earn-lightweight-title/live/amp/ |url-status=live }}</ref> However, Oliveira withdrew due to injury and was replaced by [[UFC Featherweight Championship|UFC Featherweight Champion]] [[Alexander Volkanovski]].<ref name="Rematch">{{cite web |last=Martin |first=Damon |date=October 10, 2023 |title=Charles Oliveira out; Alexander Volkanovski now faces Islam Makhachev in UFC 294 main event |url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/10/10/23912292/charles-oliveira-out-alexander-volkanovski-now-faces-islam-makhachev-in-ufc-294-main-event |access-date=October 10, 2023 |website=mmafighting.com |archive-date=October 11, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231011093653/https://www.mmafighting.com/platform/amp/2023/10/10/23912292/charles-oliveira-out-alexander-volkanovski-now-faces-islam-makhachev-in-ufc-294-main-event |url-status=live }}</ref> This marked the first time that champions in different divisions rematch for the same title and the ninth time overall that champions in different divisions fought for the same title, following [[UFC 94]], [[UFC 205]], [[UFC 226]], [[UFC 232]], [[UFC Fight Night: Cejudo vs. Dillashaw]], [[UFC 259]], [[UFC 277]] and [[UFC 284]], the latter event in which Makhachev defeated Volkanovski by unanimous decision.<ref>{{cite web |last=Mahjouri |first=Shakiel |date=February 12, 2023 |title=UFC 284 results, highlights: Islam Makhachev edges past Alexander Volkanovski to retain lightweight title |url=https://www.cbssports.com/mma/news/ufc-284-results-highlights-islam-makhachev-edges-past-alexander-volkanovski-to-retain-lightweight-title/live/amp/ |access-date=October 10, 2023 |website=cbssports.com |archive-date=October 12, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231012120102/https://www.cbssports.com/mma/news/ufc-284-results-highlights-islam-makhachev-edges-past-alexander-volkanovski-to-retain-lightweight-title/live/amp/ |url-status=live }}</ref> If successful, Volkanovski would have become the fifth person to be champion in two divisions simultaneously (after [[Conor McGregor]] at UFC 205, [[Daniel Cormier]] at UFC 226, [[Amanda Nunes]] at UFC 232 and UFC 277, and [[Henry Cejudo]] at [[UFC 238]]), as well as the eighth person overall to win a title in different divisions. Former [[Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki#Featherweight championship|KSW Featherweight]] and [[Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki#Lightweight championship|Lightweight Champion]] [[Mateusz Gamrot]] served as backup and potential replacement for this fight.<ref>{{cite web |last=Ryan |first=Joshua |date=October 7, 2023 |title=Mateusz Gamrot reportedly serves as backup fighter for Islam Makhachev vs. Charles Oliveira title bout |url=https://www.mmaweekly.com/news/mateusz-gamrot-reportedly-serves-as-backup-fighter-for-islam-makhachev-vs-charles-oliveira-title-bout |access-date=October 8, 2023 |website=mmaweekly.com |archive-date=October 7, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231007180021/https://www.mmaweekly.com/news/mateusz-gamrot-reportedly-serves-as-backup-fighter-for-islam-makhachev-vs-charles-oliveira-title-bout |url-status=live }}</ref>

A middleweight bout between [[Ikram Aliskerov]] and [[Nassourdine Imavov]] was expected to take place at the event.<ref>{{cite web |last=Leonard |first=Harvey |date=July 20, 2023 |title=Ikram Aliskerov Rebooked Following Failed Paulo Costa Fight, Faces Nassourdine Imavov At UFC 294 |url=https://www.mmanews.com/news/ikram-aliskerov-rebooked-failed-paulo-costa-fight-faces-ranked-middleweight-ufc-294 |access-date=October 7, 2023 |website=mmanews.com |archive-date=August 12, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230812210754/https://www.mmanews.com/news/ikram-aliskerov-rebooked-failed-paulo-costa-fight-faces-ranked-middleweight-ufc-294 |url-status=live }}</ref> However, Imavov withdrew due to visa issues and was replaced by [[The Ultimate Fighter: Brazil 3]] middleweight winner [[Warlley Alves]].<ref name="Alves">{{cite web |date=October 7, 2023 |title=UFC 294: Nassourdine Imavov out, Warlley Alves faces Ikram Aliskerov |url=https://www.itnwwe.com/mma/ufc-294-warlley-alves-replaces-nassourdine-imavov-vs-ikram-aliskerov/ |access-date=October 7, 2023 |website=itnwwe.com |archive-date=October 13, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231013113538/https://www.itnwwe.com/mma/ufc-294-warlley-alves-replaces-nassourdine-imavov-vs-ikram-aliskerov/ |url-status=live }}</ref>

A middleweight bout between former [[UFC Middleweight Championship]] challenger [[Paulo Costa]] and [[Khamzat Chimaev]] was expected to take place at the event.<ref>{{cite web |last=Al-Shatti |first=Shaun |date=July 19, 2023 |title=Islam Makhachev vs. Charles Oliveira 2, Khamzat Chimaev vs. Paulo Costa announced for UFC 294 |url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/7/19/23801272/islam-makhachev-vs-charles-oliveira-2-khamzat-chimaev-vs-paulo-costa-announced-for-ufc-294 |access-date=October 11, 2023 |website=mmafighting.com |archive-date=July 22, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230722085027/https://www.mmafighting.com/platform/amp/2023/7/19/23801272/islam-makhachev-vs-charles-oliveira-2-khamzat-chimaev-vs-paulo-costa-announced-for-ufc-294 |url-status=live }}</ref> However, Costa withdrew after he underwent surgery on his elbow and was replaced by former [[UFC Welterweight Championship|UFC Welterweight Champion]] [[Kamaru Usman]].<ref>{{cite web |last=Martin |first=Damon |date=October 11, 2023 |title=With Paulo Costa out, Kamaru Usman vs. Khamzat Chimaev booked as new UFC 294 co-main event |url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/10/11/23913469/with-paulo-costa-out-kamaru-usman-vs-khamzat-chimaev-booked-as-new-ufc-294-co-main-event |access-date=October 11, 2023 |website=mmafighting.com |archive-date=October 12, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231012120235/https://www.mmafighting.com/platform/amp/2023/10/11/23913469/with-paulo-costa-out-kamaru-usman-vs-khamzat-chimaev-booked-as-new-ufc-294-co-main-event |url-status=live }}</ref>

At the weigh-ins, Victoria Dudakova weighed in at 116.6 pounds, 0.6 pounds over the strawweight non-title fight limit. Mike Breeden weighed in at 159.5 pounds, three and a half pounds over the lightweight non-title fight limit. Both of their bouts proceeded at catchweight with Dudakova being fined 20% of her purse and Breeden 30%, which went to their opponents former [[Invicta Fighting Championships#Atomweight Championship|Invicta FC Atomweight Champion]] [[Jinh Yu Frey]] and [[Road to UFC Season 1#Lightweight tournament bracket|Road to UFC Season 1 lightweight tournament]] winner [[Anshul Jubli]], respectively.<ref>{{cite web |date=October 20, 2023 |title=UFC 294 weigh-in results: Two fighters miss their marks in Abu Dhabi |url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/10/ufc-294-abu-dhabi-islam-makhachev-vs-alexander-volkanovski-chimaev-usman-weigh-in-results-live-video-stream |access-date=October 20, 2023 |website=mmajunkie.usatoday.com |archive-date=October 27, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231027092733/https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/10/ufc-294-abu-dhabi-islam-makhachev-vs-alexander-volkanovski-chimaev-usman-weigh-in-results-live-video-stream |url-status=live }}</ref>

== Bonus awards ==
The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.<ref>{{cite web |last=Taylor |first=Chris |date=October 21, 2023 |title=UFC 294 Bonus Report: Islam Makhachev one of four fighters to take home an extra $50k |url=https://www.bjpenn.com/mma-news/ufc-294/ufc-294-bonus-report-islam-makhachev-one-of-four-fighters-to-take-home-an-extra-50k/ |access-date=October 21, 2023 |website=bjpenn.com |archive-date=October 22, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231022035346/https://www.bjpenn.com/mma-news/ufc-294/ufc-294-bonus-report-islam-makhachev-one-of-four-fighters-to-take-home-an-extra-50k/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
*'''Fight of the Night:''' No bonus awarded.
*'''Performance of the Night: Islam Makhachev, Ikram Aliskerov, Said Nurmagomedov''', and '''	Muhammad Mokaev'''
